query:
You are a competitive intelligence analyst building a deep benchmark profile of Transcarent (https://transcarent.com).

Search https://transcarent.com, https://transcarent.com/pricing, https://transcarent.com/plans, Crunchbase, LinkedIn, G2, Capterra, TechCrunch, and recent news. Run several searches with adjacent keywords to ensure full breadth.

Extract the following — include a source URL for each section:

PRICING: Visit https://transcarent.com/pricing and https://transcarent.com/plans. List every plan name, exact monthly USD price, exact annual USD price, free tier availability (true/false), any recent pricing changes.

FUNDING: Search Crunchbase and news for 'Transcarent funding'. Extract: funding stage, latest round amount USD, round date (YYYY-MM-DD), round type (Seed/Series A/B/C/etc), total raised USD, all investor names.

COMPANY: Find the LinkedIn company page URL for Transcarent. Extract current employee count. Note any headcount growth signals from LinkedIn or news.

FOUNDERS: Find CEO and founder names for Transcarent. Extract their LinkedIn profile URLs. Search for recent LinkedIn posts or press statements from founders (last 6 months) — extract the key signal or quote for each.

SIGNALS: Search news and press from the last 6 months about Transcarent. For each item extract: date, headline, signal type (funding/product/hiring/partnership/press), source URL.

POSITIONING: List key differentiators of Transcarent vs alternatives. Identify primary target customer segment. List up to 5 publicly known customers — for each, classify: 'Grand compte' (CAC40/Fortune500), 'ETI' (mid-size 250-5000 employees), 'PME' (<250 employees), 'Startup', or 'Consumer'. Include industry and any concrete result.

ACQUISITION: Find whether Transcarent has been acquired. If yes: acquirer name, amount in EUR, year, source URL. If not acquired, return acquired=false.

WEAKNESSES: Search G2, Capterra, Reddit, Hacker News for user complaints or limitations of Transcarent. List the most recurring themes.
answer:
**Executive Summary**
Transcarent is a late-stage digital health and benefits navigation company valued at $3 billion as of May 2026, targeting self-insured employers and health plans [12. Transcarent](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/05/19/transcarent-cnbc-disruptor-50-ranking.html) [Walmart and Transcarent partner to lower costs in the self-insured market | Healthcare Finance News](https://www.healthcarefinancenews.com/news/walmart-and-transcarent-partner-lower-costs-self-insured-market). The company differentiates itself through a fully at-risk, "premium-free" B2B pricing model that eliminates traditional per-employee, per-month (PEPM) fees and passes 100% of pharmacy rebates back to employers [Walmart and Transcarent partner to lower costs in the self-insured market | Healthcare Finance News](https://www.healthcarefinancenews.com/news/walmart-and-transcarent-partner-lower-costs-self-insured-market) [Transcarent Expands WayFinding™ Platform with SmithRx to Offer More Options for Pharmacy Pricing Transparency and Lower Drug Costs to Employers](https://transcarent.com/press-releases/transcarent-expands-wayfinding-tm-platform-with-smithrx-to-offer-more-options-for-pharmacy-pricing-transparency-and-lower-drug-costs-to-employers). Transcarent has recently scaled its market share and AI capabilities through aggressive M&A activity, most notably its $621 million acquisition of Accolade in April 2025 [Digital health startup Transcarent takes Accolade private in $621 million deal](https://www.cnbc.com/2025/04/08/digital-health-startup-transcarent-completes-621m-accolade-merger.html).

---

### 1. Product Positioning & Pricing

**Positioning & Differentiators**
Transcarent primarily targets self-insured employers and health plans [Walmart and Transcarent partner to lower costs in the self-insured market | Healthcare Finance News](https://www.healthcarefinancenews.com/news/walmart-and-transcarent-partner-lower-costs-self-insured-market) [Health Plans: Transform Your Member Engagement](https://transcarent.com/health-plans). Its core differentiators include:
*   **At-Risk Financial Model:** Transcarent charges no up-front or PEPM fees, utilizing a simple, all-in administrative fee that replaces hidden fees and spread pricing [Walmart and Transcarent partner to lower costs in the self-insured market | Healthcare Finance News](https://www.healthcarefinancenews.com/news/walmart-and-transcarent-partner-lower-costs-self-insured-market) [Transcarent Expands WayFinding™ Platform with SmithRx to Offer More Options for Pharmacy Pricing Transparency and Lower Drug Costs to Employers](https://transcarent.com/press-releases/transcarent-expands-wayfinding-tm-platform-with-smithrx-to-offer-more-options-for-pharmacy-pricing-transparency-and-lower-drug-costs-to-employers).
*   **100% Rebate Pass-Through:** The company passes 100% of pharmacy rebates and discounts directly back to the employer [Transcarent Expands WayFinding™ Platform with SmithRx to Offer More Options for Pharmacy Pricing Transparency and Lower Drug Costs to Employers](https://transcarent.com/press-releases/transcarent-expands-wayfinding-tm-platform-with-smithrx-to-offer-more-options-for-pharmacy-pricing-transparency-and-lower-drug-costs-to-employers).
*   **Predictable Bundled Rates:** The platform uses pre-negotiated, bundled rates for surgical procedures to ensure predictable costs [10 health systems join Transcarent's network to simplify healthcare pricing - Becker's Hospital Review](https://www.beckershospitalreview.com/healthcare-information-technology/10-health-systems-join-transcarents-network-to-simplify-healthcare-pricing/).
*   **Operational Efficiency:** Transcarent claims its AI-powered navigation can reduce administrative costs for health plans by up to 40% [Health Plans: Transform Your Member Engagement](https://transcarent.com/health-plans).

**Pricing Structure**
Transcarent operates on a B2B enterprise healthcare model rather than standard SaaS tiers. 
*   **Employer Cost:** Fully at-risk; no standard monthly/annual flat USD subscription prices are utilized [Walmart and Transcarent partner to lower costs in the self-insured market | Healthcare Finance News](https://www.healthcarefinancenews.com/news/walmart-and-transcarent-partner-lower-costs-self-insured-market).
*   **End-User (Patient) Cost:** 
    *   Surgery costs (including pre/post-operative care) and virtual orthopedic assessments are covered at 100% ($0 cost) for participants in specific EPO/PPO plans like SAG-AFTRA and MCSIG [Transcarent Surgery Care | SAG-AFTRA Plans](https://www.sagaftraplans.org/health/benefits/transcarent-surgery-care) [Transcarent Surgery Care - My ACI Benefits](https://myaci-benefits.com/health/transcarent/).
    *   For High Deductible Health Plans (HDHP) with an HSA, services cost $0 only after the annual deductible is met [MCSIG | Transcarent Benefits](https://mcsig.com/health-plans/current-plans/transcarent-surgery-care).
    *   Virtual doctor visits have flat copays of $10 or $25 in certain plans, such as Chubb [Transcarent Digital Health and Cancer Support | MyBenefits at Chubb](https://learn.bswift.com/chubb-active/transcarent-digital-health-and-cancer-support).

**Customer Portfolio**
1.  **Walmart** | *Grand compte (Fortune 500)* | Retail | **Result:** Partnered to lower costs in the self-insured market [Walmart and Transcarent partner to lower costs in the self-insured market | Healthcare Finance News](https://www.healthcarefinancenews.com/news/walmart-and-transcarent-partner-lower-costs-self-insured-market).
2.  **Chubb** | *Grand compte (Fortune 500)* | Insurance | **Result:** Secured flat copays of $10 or $25 for virtual doctor visits [Transcarent Digital Health and Cancer Support | MyBenefits at Chubb](https://learn.bswift.com/chubb-active/transcarent-digital-health-and-cancer-support).
3.  **SAG-AFTRA Plans** | *ETI* | Entertainment | **Result:** Surgery costs covered at 100% ($0 cost) for participants and dependents [Transcarent Surgery Care | SAG-AFTRA Plans](https://www.sagaftraplans.org/health/benefits/transcarent-surgery-care).
4.  **MCSIG** | *ETI* | Municipal/Education | **Result:** Surgery costs covered at 100% after annual HDHP deductible is met [MCSIG | Transcarent Benefits](https://mcsig.com/health-plans/current-plans/transcarent-surgery-care).
5.  **Unnamed Retail Employer** | *Grand compte / ETI* | Retail | **Result:** 2023 case study showed navigation and Surgery Center of Excellence services yielded average savings of $14 per member per month (PMPM) [Transforming Member Health and Costs](https://www.oregon.gov/oha/HPA/HP/HCMOPageDocs/046-Transcarent-CaseStudy-Transforming-Member-Health-15a.pdf).

---

### 2. Financials & Funding

*   **Funding Stage:** Late Stage Venture [Series D - Transcarent - Crunchbase Funding Round Profile](https://www.crunchbase.com/funding_round/transcarent-series-d--4a9d0027).
*   **Latest Round:** An undisclosed funding round raising $480,999,962 on April 22, 2025 [Funding Round - Transcarent - 2025-04-22 - Crunchbase Funding Round Profile](https://www.crunchbase.com/funding_round/transcarent-undisclosed--db07d211). Prior to this, the company raised a $126 million Series D on May 2, 2024 [Digital health startup Transcarent valued at $2.2 bln after latest funding round | Reuters](https://www.reuters.com/business/healthcare-pharmaceuticals/digital-health-startup-transcarent-valued-22-bln-after-latest-funding-round-2024-05-02/).
*   **Total Raised:** Estimates vary significantly by data provider. Tracxn reports $424 million [Transcarent - 2026 Funding Rounds & List of Investors - Tracxn](https://tracxn.com/d/companies/transcarent/__VnamlKlpgk_C8ZCPLsR3fAll9_s-EYISK4o9OGHEAw0/funding-and-investors), PitchBook reports $905 million [Transcarent 2026 Company Profile: Valuation, Funding & Investors | PitchBook](https://pitchbook.com/profiles/company/442864-27), and Forge reports $1.13 billion [Transcarent IPO: Investment Opportunities & Pre-IPO Valuations - Forge](https://forgeglobal.com/transcarent_ipo/).
*   **Valuation:** Reached $3 billion as of May 2026 [12. Transcarent](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/05/19/transcarent-cnbc-disruptor-50-ranking.html).
*   **Investors:** General Catalyst and 7wireVentures (Series D leads). Other investors include Geodesic Capital, Memorial Hermann Health System, Threshold Ventures, Kinnevik, Ally Bridge Group, Human Capital, Merck Global Health Innovation Fund, Alta Partners, Leaps by Bayer, 62 Ventures, Northwell Health, Intermountain Healthcare, Rush University Medical Center, 50 South Capital, Kleiner Perkins, GreatPoint Ventures, Jove Equity Partners, Bridgespan VC, and Village of New Hyde Park [Transcarent Raises $126 Million Series D | Business Wire](https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20240502320693/en/Transcarent-Raises-$126-Million-Series-D) [Wilson Sonsini Advises Transcarent on $126 Million Series D | Wilson Sonsini](https://www.wsgr.com/en/insights/wilson-sonsini-advises-transcarent-on-dollar126-million-series-d.html) [Transcarent - 2026 Funding Rounds & List of Investors - Tracxn](https://tracxn.com/d/companies/transcarent/__VnamlKlpgk_C8ZCPLsR3fAll9_s-EYISK4o9OGHEAw0/funding-and-investors).

---

### 3. Company & Leadership

**Headcount & Growth**
*   **LinkedIn URL:** [https://www.linkedin.com/company/transcarent](https://www.linkedin.com/company/transcarent)
*   **Employee Count:** Data providers show wide discrepancies. Unify reports 348 employees as of April 22, 2026 [Employee Data and Trends for Transcarent | Unify](https://www.unifygtm.com/insights-headcount/transcarent). PitchBook reports 454 [Transcarent 2026 Company Profile: Valuation, Funding & Investors | PitchBook](https://pitchbook.com/profiles/company/442864-27), LeadIQ reports ~645 [Transcarent Company Overview, Contact Details & Competitors | LeadIQ](https://leadiq.com/c/transcarent/60351812411f372b40218d6d), Tracxn reports 776 [Transcarent - 2026 Company Profile, Team, Funding & Competitors - Tracxn](https://tracxn.com/d/companies/transcarent/__VnamlKlpgk_C8ZCPLsR3fAll9_s-EYISK4o9OGHEAw0), and ZoomInfo estimates 1,000-5,000 [Transcarent - Overview, News & Similar companies | ZoomInfo.com](https://www.zoominfo.com/c/transcarent-inc/544907515).
*   **Growth Signals:** Transcarent has exhibited measured organic growth, with Unify noting a 7.2% YoY increase (approx. 60 additions vs. 30 departures) [Employee Data and Trends for Transcarent | Unify](https://www.unifygtm.com/insights-headcount/transcarent), while Growjo reports 10% YoY growth [Transcarent: Revenue, Competitors, Alternatives](https://growjo.com/company/Transcarent). Engineering is the largest department, comprising 19% of the workforce (66 employees) [Employee Data and Trends for Transcarent | Unify](https://www.unifygtm.com/insights-headcount/transcarent). Headcount has also been augmented by absorbing employees from its acquisition of 98point6's virtual care business [98point6 hit by new layoffs in latest change at health tech startup – GeekWire](https://www.geekwire.com/2024/98point6-hit-by-new-layoffs-in-latest-change-at-health-tech-startup/).

**Founders & Leadership**
*   **Glen Tullman** (CEO & Founder): [https://www.linkedin.com/in/glen-tullman-76108566/](https://www.linkedin.com/in/glen-tullman-76108566/) [Glen Tullman Bio](https://transcarent.com/glen-tullman-bio).
*   **Krishnan Sridharan** (Co-Founder) [Transcarent CEO and Key Executive Team | Craft.co](https://craft.co/transcarent/executives).
*   **Snezana Mahon, Pharm.D.** (President): [https://www.linkedin.com/in/snezana-mahon-pharm-d-9b586a40/](https://www.linkedin.com/in/snezana-mahon-pharm-d-9b586a40/) [Snezana Mahon, Pharm.D. - Transcarent | LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/snezana-mahon-pharm-d-9b586a40/).

**Recent Leadership Signals (Last 6 Months)**
*   *On AI Strategy:* Tullman stated, "AI is now a strategic necessity, not a nice-to-have" [Glen Tullman - Chief Executive Officer at Transcarent](https://www.linkedin.com/in/glen-tullman-76108566/). He also noted recent funding will be used to "further expand its application's AI and pursue additional acquisitions" [Transcarent: 2025 CNBC Disruptor 50](https://www.cnbc.com/2025/06/10/transcarent-cnbc-disruptor-50-ranking.html).
*   *On the Accolade Acquisition:* Tullman remarked, "This will be the biggest thing I’ve ever done" [Glen Tullman, Founder of Trancarent Prioritizes Fixing Healthcare](https://www.inc.com/bill-saporito/meet-the-healthcare-ceo-with-more-friends-than-enemies/91162758).
*   *On the Healthcare Industry:* Tullman posted that "the current state is unsustainable, and bold leadership must step up" [Glen Tullman - Chief Executive Officer at Transcarent](https://www.linkedin.com/in/glen-tullman-76108566/) and celebrated that "After years of effort, finally affordable insulin — without ongoing government subsidies" [Glen Tullman - Transcarent | LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/glen-tullman-76108566/).
*   *On Leadership:* Tullman praised Taylor Swift, posting: "TAYLOR SWIFT IS...THE BEST CEO IN THE WORLD?! I think so" [Glen Tullman - Chief Executive Officer at Transcarent](https://www.linkedin.com/in/glen-tullman-76108566/).

---

### 4. M&A Activity & Recent Signals

**Acquisition Status**
*   **Acquired:** `false`. Transcarent has not been acquired.
*   **Acquisitions Made:** Transcarent has acted as an aggressive acquirer. In April 2025, it completed a $621 million acquisition to take health benefits navigator Accolade private, adding 15.4 million customers [Digital health startup Transcarent takes Accolade private in $621 million deal](https://www.cnbc.com/2025/04/08/digital-health-startup-transcarent-completes-621m-accolade-merger.html). It also previously acquired the AI-enabled virtual care platform and care business from 98point6 for approximately $100 million [Transcarent finalizes merger with Accolade | MobiHealthNews](https://www.mobihealthnews.com/news/transcarent-finalizes-merger-accolade).

**Recent Signals (Jan - Jun 2026)**
*   **January 2026 (Product):** Transcarent launched its WayFinding 2.0 platform at CES, introducing new "agentic" AI capabilities, scheduling tools, and a "Total Recall Memory Engine" [Transcarent - 2026 Company Profile, Team, Funding & Competitors - Tracxn](https://tracxn.com/d/companies/transcarent/__VnamlKlpgk_C8ZCPLsR3fAll9_s-EYISK4o9OGHEAw0).
*   **May 2026 (Funding/Press):** Transcarent's valuation officially reached $3 billion following the integration of Accolade [12. Transcarent](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/05/19/transcarent-cnbc-disruptor-50-ranking.html).
*   **June 2026 (Press):** Transcarent was highlighted in the CNBC Disruptor 50 ranking, with CEO Glen Tullman confirming plans for further AI expansion and M&A [Transcarent: 2025 CNBC Disruptor 50](https://www.cnbc.com/2025/06/10/transcarent-cnbc-disruptor-50-ranking.html).

---

### 5. Gaps and Limitations
Based strictly on the provided findings, the following requested data points could not be fulfilled:
*   **Exact SaaS Pricing:** Because Transcarent uses a B2B at-risk healthcare model, standard SaaS metrics like "exact monthly USD price," "exact annual USD price," and "free tier availability" do not exist or were not found in the provided sources.
*   **Weaknesses:** No user complaints, limitations, or recurring negative themes were found in the provided search results from G2, Capterra, Reddit, or Hacker News.
*   **Co-Founder LinkedIn:** A LinkedIn profile URL for Co-Founder Krishnan Sridharan was not present in the findings.
